nasb.text: He sinks a shaft far from habitation, Forgotten by the foot; They hang and swing to and fro far from men.

esv.text: He opens shafts in a valley away from where anyone lives; they are forgotten by travelers; they hang in the air, far away from mankind; they swing to and fro.

cnv.text: 在無人居住之處， 足跡罕至之地開坑探礦， 他們與人遠離，懸在坑中搖來搖去。

ccb.text: 他们在杳无人烟、人踪绝迹之地开矿， 他们远离人群，悬在半空摇来摇去。
